title: Teach You a Lesson
storyline: The collapse of teachers' authority leads to the establishment of the Teachers' Authority Protection Bureau under the Ministry of Education, and the dispatch of supervisors to problem schools to punish students and parents who cross the line.
stars: Kim Mu-yeol, Lee Sung-min, Jin Ki-joo

title: The Wonderfools
storyline: A group of awkward townies who unexpectedly gain superpowers and fight villains threatening the peace of Haeseong city.
stars: Park Eun-bin, Cha Eun-woo, Kim Hae-sook

title: Bloodhounds
storyline: In order to pay off their debt, three daring youths jump into the money-lending business while confronting the rich and powerful who prey on the weak.
stars: Woo Do-Hwan, Lee Sang-yi, Tae Won-Seok

title: Squid Game
storyline: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games. A tempting prize awaits, but with deadly high stakes.
stars: Lee Jung-jae, Wi Ha-joon, Jeon Young-soo

title: Weak Hero Class 1
storyline: Yeon Shi-eun is a model student who ranks at the top at his school. Physically, he appears like a weak boy, but by using his smarts, tools, and psychology, he fights against violence that takes place inside and outside of his school.
stars: Park Ji-hoon, Hong Kyung, Choi Hyun-wook

title: Crash Landing on You
storyline: A wealthy South Korean heiress accidentally paraglides into North Korea and meets a charismatic North Korean army officer who helps her hide. As they navigate the dangers of their situation, they fall in love despite the political tensions between their countries.
stars: Hyun Bin, Son Ye-jin, Seo Ji-hye

title: Goblin
storyline: A centuries-old goblin cursed with immortality seeks his human bride to end his immortal life. When he meets a young woman who can see ghosts, their fates become intertwined in a tale of love, destiny, and the price of eternal life.
stars: Gong Yoo, Kim Go-eun, Lee Dong-wook

title: Descendants of the Sun
storyline: A special forces captain and a highly skilled surgeon fall in love amidst dangerous missions and humanitarian efforts in a war-torn country. Their relationship faces challenges from their demanding careers and the harsh realities of their work.
stars: Song Joong-ki, Song Hye-kyo, Kim Ji-won

title: My Love from the Star
storyline: An alien who has been living on Earth for 400 years falls in love with a famous actress who is his neighbor. Despite their impossible love story, they navigate the challenges of his impending departure and her celebrity life.
stars: Jun Ji-hyun, Kim Soo-hyun, Park Hae-jin

title: It's Okay to Not Be Okay
storyline: A children's book author who struggles with antisocial personality disorder meets a psychiatric ward caregiver who works at a hospital. Their relationship helps both heal from their traumatic pasts and learn to accept love.
stars: Kim Soo-hyun, Seo Yea-ji, Oh Jung-se

title: Kingdom
storyline: Set in Korea's Joseon period, a crown prince investigates a mysterious plague that is turning people into zombies. He must uncover the truth while fighting political enemies and surviving the undead threat.
stars: Ju Ji-hoon, Bae Doona, Kim Sung-kyu

title: Extraordinary Attorney Woo
storyline: A brilliant young lawyer with autism spectrum disorder starts her career at a top law firm. Despite her challenges with social interactions, she shows exceptional legal abilities and empathy for her clients.
stars: Park Eun-bin, Kang Tae-oh, Kang Ki-young

title: The Glory
storyline: A woman who suffered brutal school violence as a teenager returns as an adult to take revenge on her bullies. She carefully orchestrates a plan to destroy their lives while they are now successful adults.
stars: Song Hye-kyo, Lee Do-hyun, Im Ji-yeon

title: Reply 1988
storyline: The series follows the lives of five childhood friends and their families living in the same neighborhood in Seoul during the late 1980s. It portrays the beauty of friendship, family bonds, and first loves through a nostalgic lens.
stars: Lee Hye-ri, Ryu Jun-yeol, Park Bo-gum

title: Vincenzo
storyline: An Italian-Korean mafia lawyer returns to South Korea and becomes involved with a tenant lawyer who is fighting against a corrupt conglomerate. Using his unique skills and methods, he brings justice to the corrupt while falling for the passionate lawyer.
stars: Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been, Ok Taec-yeon
